TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cbiyaw cbiyaw ciida pa, kiya rungay knxalan sediq ciida uri pa, malu balay dngusan na ka kndussn dsediq. Mhapuy ta macu ciida, kiya ida nkiya mkksa ka thuun qhuni psqama nanaq; mpkan wawa ciida u kiya ida nkiya hmiti kingal ubal ka boyak, kiya hngedan ka kingal ubal daw, kiya wa mthngay kama ka malu sknxan wawa. Kiya mi masu lux mkmsipaq boyak ka taxa sediq, msaang bay ka boyak, mnchaya rmngaw: "Yamu sediq pa,naqah babay kana ka yamu, ngalan namu msspais cmiyuk ka mnhuway nii! Kndadax saya daw, ana nanaq mseuriq lmawa walu ka yamu, uxay nami bay ka yamu, uxay nami bay miiyah, yami pa,saun namu smliq ka nriqan mhuma pnwalang namu!"mhdu rmngaw daw wada mrmux dwiyaq ruwan da. Bukuy daw, ini bay sdalih alang ka boyak, kiya wada tiling ddwiyaq ka rahuq ccamac uri da, asi bay ka musa tmcamac, kiya niqan uqun ka wawa ccamac.
S.PHON: ʦbijaw ʦbijaw ʦiida pa, kija ɾuŋaj knxalan sədiq ʦiida uɾi pa, malu balaj dŋusan na ka kndussn dsədiq. mħapuj ta maʦu ʦiida, kija ida nkija mkksa ka tħuun qħuni psqama nanaq; mpkan wawa ʦiida u kija ida nkija ħmiti kiŋal ubal ka bojak, kija ħŋədan ka kiŋal ubal daw, kija wa mtħŋaj kama ka malu sknxan wawa. kija mi masu lux mkmsipaq bojak ka taxa sədiq, msaaŋ baj ka bojak, mnʦħaja ɾmŋaw: "jamu sədiq pa,naqaħ babaj kana ka jamu, ŋalan namu msspais ʦmijuk ka mnħuwaj nii! kndadax saja daw, ana nanaq msəuɾiq lmawa walu ka jamu, uxaj nami baj ka jamu, uxaj nami baj miijaħ, jami pa,saun namu smliq ka nɾiqan mħuma pnwalaŋ namu!"mħdu ɾmŋaw daw wada mɾmux dwijaq ɾuwan da. bukuj daw, ini baj sdaliħ alaŋ ka bojak, kija wada tiliŋ ddwijaq ka ɾaħuq ʦʦamaʦ uɾi da, asi baj ka musa tmʦamaʦ, kija niqan uqun ka wawa ʦʦamaʦ.
S.FORM: Cbiyaw cbiyaw ciida pa, kiya rungay knxalan sediq ciida uri pa, malu balay dngusan na ka kndussn dsediq. Mhapuy ta macu ciida, kiya ida nkiya mkksa ka thuun qhuni psqama nanaq; mpkan wawa ciida u kiya ida nkiya hmiti kingal ubal ka boyak, kiya hngedan ka kingal ubal daw, kiya wa mthngay kama ka malu sknxan wawa. Kiya mi masu lux mkmsipaq boyak ka taxa sediq, msaang bay ka boyak, mnchaya rmngaw: "Yamu sediq pa,naqah babay kana ka yamu, ngalan namu msspais cmiyuk ka mnhuway nii! Kndadax saya daw, ana nanaq mseuriq lmawa walu ka yamu, uxay nami bay ka yamu, uxay nami bay miiyah, yami pa,saun namu smliq ka nriqan mhuma pnwalang namu!"mhdu rmngaw daw wada mrmux dwiyaq ruwan da. Bukuy daw, ini bay sdalih alang ka boyak, kiya wada tiling ddwiyaq ka rahuq ccamac uri da, asi bay ka musa tmcamac, kiya niqan uqun ka wawa ccamac.
S.PHON: ʦbijaw ʦbijaw ʦiida pa, kija ɾuŋaj knxalan sədiq ʦiida uɾi pa, malu balaj dŋusan na ka kndussn dsədiq. mħapuj ta maʦu ʦiida, kija ida nkija mkksa ka tħuun qħuni psqama nanaq; mpkan wawa ʦiida u kija ida nkija ħmiti kiŋal ubal ka bojak, kija ħŋədan ka kiŋal ubal daw, kija wa mtħŋaj kama ka malu sknxan wawa. kija mi masu lux mkmsipaq bojak ka taxa sədiq, msaaŋ baj ka bojak, mnʦħaja ɾmŋaw: "jamu sədiq pa,naqaħ babaj kana ka jamu, ŋalan namu msspais ʦmijuk ka mnħuwaj nii! kndadax saja daw, ana nanaq msəuɾiq lmawa walu ka jamu, uxaj nami baj ka jamu, uxaj nami baj miijaħ, jami pa,saun namu smliq ka nɾiqan mħuma pnwalaŋ namu!"mħdu ɾmŋaw daw wada mɾmux dwijaq ɾuwan da. bukuj daw, ini baj sdaliħ alaŋ ka bojak, kija wada tiliŋ ddwijaq ka ɾaħuq ʦʦamaʦ uɾi da, asi baj ka musa tmʦamaʦ, kija niqan uqun ka wawa ʦʦamaʦ.
